---
title: "L3 detection-efficiency study"
subtitle: "Measuring romancal SourceCatalogStep recovery on simulated Roman L3 mosaics"
---

## What this is

A reproducible pipeline to measure the detection efficiency of the Roman
L3 (`MosaicPipeline`) + `SourceCatalogStep` stack as a function of:

- **sky position** (several skycells spanning the HLWAS footprint),
- **zodiacal background** (skycells picked across ecliptic latitude),
- **local HLWAS coverage** (skycells picked across local exposure
  density — drives mosaic per-pixel depth),
- **source type** (point sources vs exponential-profile galaxies),
- **source magnitude** (F158, 23.0–26.0),
- **`SourceCatalogStep` parameters** (`kernel_fwhm`, `npixels`).

The workflow is four substantive phases + aggregation:

1. **Skycell selection** — pick *N* target skycells stratified by
   (ecliptic latitude × HLWAS coverage) from the Wide-Field2 survey
   footprint.
2. **HLWAS expansion** — for each skycell, find every HLWAS F158
   (pointing, SCA) whose CRDS-backed WCS overlaps.
3. **Truth-catalog generation** — 210 stars + 210 galaxies per
   skycell, disjoint Sobol positions, F158 23.0–26.0 in 0.15-mag bins.
4. **L2 simulation → L3 mosaic → source detection** —
   `romanisim-make-image` per (pointing, SCA), `MosaicPipeline`
   per skycell, `SourceCatalogStep` at defaults and parameter sweeps.
5. **Cross-skycell summary** — roll up per-mosaic efficiency curves,
   50%-completeness vs depth, and parameter-sweep deltas.

This sits alongside the existing [Full run](../full/design.qmd) report
and reuses the same `roman_l2_job` pixi environment, CRDS cache, and
STPSF data.

## Data locations

Code, configs, and selection artefacts live in this repo. The bulk L2
and L3 binary products live under `output/detection/` on the host,
outside version control (gitignored). A pointer to the external
storage path can be added once the external backup is set up.

## Status

- [Phase 1 — skycell selection](phase1_pointings.qmd)
- [Phase 2 — HLWAS expansion](phase2_skycells.qmd)
- [Phase 3 — truth-catalog generation](phase3_catalogs.qmd)
- [Phase 6 — full-scale summary](phase6_summary.qmd) — default
  detection + `kernel_fwhm` + `npixels` sweeps across every mosaic
